reviews.comment:
Lugar frecuente donde parar camino a Rosario. Muy pintoresco. Juegos p niños, ricos desayunos con pastelería del lugar, se destacan las medialunas y ensaimadas. Podes comprar alfajores y productos regionales para el regreso a casa!

(Translated by Google)
A popular stop on the way to Rosario. Very picturesque. They have a children's play area, delicious breakfasts with local pastries—the medialunas and ensaimadas are especially noteworthy. You can also buy alfajores and other regional products for your trip home!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnX2EyZTh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para parrar. Siempre con baños limpios, buen servicio y todo como corresponde.
Puede haber mucha gente en los feriados o fines de semana.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop. Always clean restrooms, good service, and everything as it should be.
It can get very crowded on holidays or weekends.
